title: WHO explanation fails sniff test: Mu more common surname than Xi
description: WHO claims it skipped Xi for Omicron because it's a 'surname,' but Mu more common, while all previous Greek letters also surnames | 2021-11-29 17:56:00
snippet: TAIPEI (Taiwan News) — The World Health Organization's (WHO's) official explanation for skipping two letters in the Greek alphabet to name the latest COVID va...
